name: evaluate
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.decimal === null || typeof output.result.decimal === 'number'
_note: root.evaluate tokenises a multi-term base-6/decimal expression (operators + - * / % and parentheses, decimal numerals AND glyph runs), runs shunting-yard → RPN, and reports the decimal + glyph + per-step semantic readings. Pure compute, no DB/actor dependency — the assassin's internal actor returns ok:true on any valid expression and a clean ok:false (never a throw or no_db) on empty/malformed input. result.decimal is null for a non-finite result (e.g. divide by Refusal).
